item.title: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: WA bill would remove PDC filing requirement concerning foreign nationals | Washington | thecentersquare.com
item.description: News article "WA bill would remove PDC filing requirement concerning foreign nationals | Washington | thecentersquare.com" from The Center Square.
